emails.subject: HL&P for 12/99
emails.body: HL&P was short on the following days: December 4th (2256) 9th (7214) 11th (2527) 12th (3537) 15th (7058) 16th (4776) 17th (4465) 28th (264) How do you want to handle this?? Forwarded by Kimberly Vaughn/HOU/ECT on 01/12/2000 01:07 PM Anita Luong 01/12/2000 10:46 AM

emails.subject: Re: HL&P for 12/99
emails.body: Re: HL&P for 12/99 It is the pipelines decision on how to allocate between the shippers, however, If the pipeline allocates the shortage to ENA then we need to follow the contract language and bill accordingly. Just remember that we allowed makeup on the 18, 19, 20th for a total volume of 5K over 3 days so that will apply toward the 4th and part of the 9th. All other volumes should be purchased back per the language in the contract. Remember they have a tolerance of 5% below the nomination. Thanks, Janet Kimberly Vaughn 01/12/2000 02:13 PM
